title: Home row: ASDF JKL;
description: Welcome to Teen Course! Start with the resting position of your fingers.
text: asdf jkl; asdf jkl; asdf jkl; ask sad lad fall sass
finger_focus: Home row - left and right hands

tips.text: First lesson, and it's the most important one. Not the letters - the hands. Get your fingers landing on the right keys without looking, and you've basically unlocked the cheat code for everything else.

These eight keys are home base. Left hand on A S D F (pinky to index), right hand on J K L ; (index to pinky). Feel the little bumps on F and J - those are your anchors. Land your index fingers there by feel and the rest fall into place. Thumbs rest on the space bar.

tips.title: Don't look down
tips.text: The easiest way to fool yourself is to peek, then drop your fingers. Don't. Find the keys by feel. Your finger already knows where F and J are - that's the whole trick.

tips.target: asdf jkl; asdf jkl; asdf jkl; asdf jkl; asdf jkl; asdf jkl; asdf jkl; asdf jkl; asdf jkl; asdf jkl;
tips.title: Set your hands
tips.hint: All eight fingers on A S D F and J K L ;. Run them in order, no looking. Ten passes to lock the position in.

tips.text: Hands are set. Now we build muscle memory - one group at a time, lots of reps. Left hand first: A S D F, pinky to index. Press, return home, repeat. Steady beat, eyes off your hands.

tips.target: a s d f a s d f a s d f a s d f a s d f
tips.title: Left hand
tips.hint: Left hand home row: A S D F, pinky to index

tips.target: j k l ; j k l ; j k l ; j k l ; j k l ;
tips.title: Right hand
tips.hint: Right hand home row: J K L ;, index to pinky

tips.text: Both hands warmed up? Time for real words - all of them stay on the home row, no reaching anywhere. Read the whole word, then type it clean.
Accuracy beats speed. Speed shows up on its own once your accuracy stops wobbling.

tips.target: ask sad lad fall sass ask sad lad fall sass
tips.title: Words
tips.hint: Home row words: ask, sad, lad, fall, sass

tips.text: All steps done? Hit "Open trainer" below and do one full run on the whole lesson text. That run saves your progress and unlocks the next lesson.

character_tips.anna: Home row first. Find F and J by feel - those bumps are your anchors.
character_tips.maxim: ASDF JKL; - eight keys you'll return to a million times. Start here.
character_tips.knopych: BEEP BOOP! Home row activated! 🤖 Find F and J - those bumps! Got 'em?
character_tips.klavochka: These are your finger pillows, my dear! Cozy and ready 💤
